notice.label: NOTICE
notice.text: Official launch coming soon — Operonix platform is currently in final preparation phase.

hero.description: Unified MES, OEE, Production, Quality, Maintenance, and Logistics in one enterprise platform. Built for automotive standards and industrial scale.
hero.mobileQrSubtitleStore: Scan the Android code for Google Play and the iOS code for the App Store to install the app.
hero.mobileQrSubtitleWeb: QR codes open the website in your browser, not the store install yet. After the native apps are published, the same codes will be pointed to Google Play and the App Store (configured in hosting).
hero.mobileQrSubtitleMixed: Some apps already use store install links; others still open the web version until their store URLs are configured.

modules.title: One platform. Complete control.
modules.description: Integrated modules that work together seamlessly to digitize your entire manufacturing operation.

items.name: Production
items.description: Production planning, execution control, order tracking and resource coordination in one structured workflow.

items.name: MES
items.description: Real-time production tracking, work order management, and shop floor control for complete manufacturing visibility.

items.name: OEE
items.description: Comprehensive equipment performance tracking with availability, performance, and quality metrics at your fingertips.

items.name: Maintenance
items.description: Predictive and preventive maintenance scheduling to maximize equipment uptime and extend asset lifecycle.

items.name: Quality
items.description: End-to-end quality control with inspection planning, non-conformance handling, and statistical process control.

items.name: Logistics
items.description: Streamlined material flow from receiving to shipping with barcode/RFID integration and inventory optimization.

automotive.title: Built for the most demanding industry standards.
automotive.description: From Tier 1 suppliers to OEMs, Operonix provides the tools and documentation infrastructure needed to meet and exceed automotive quality requirements.

certifications.title: IATF 16949 Ready
certifications.description: Built-in compliance features for automotive quality management system requirements.

certifications.title: APQP / PPAP Support
certifications.description: Integrated tools for Advanced Product Quality Planning and Production Part Approval Process.

certifications.title: VDA 6.3 Aligned
certifications.description: Process audit tools aligned with German Automotive Industry Association standards.

complianceFeatures: Full traceability from raw material to finished product
Audit trail for all quality events

solutions.title: Transform every aspect of manufacturing.
solutions.description: Purpose-built solutions that deliver measurable results across your operations.

items.title: Production
items.description: Full production execution and control across all lines and processes.

cta.title: Ready to transform your manufacturing operations?
cta.description: Join hundreds of manufacturers who have modernized their operations with Operonix. Get a personalized demo and see how we can help achieve your production goals.

footer.description: Enterprise manufacturing platform for industrial excellence.

privacyPolicy.metaTitle: Privacy Policy – Operonix Production | Operonix Industrial
privacyPolicy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Operonix Production app: what we collect, how we use and share data, security, deletion requests, and contact details.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy – Operonix Production
privacyPolicy.intro: Operonix Production is an application for managing manufacturing and business processes.

collection.heading: Data collection
collection.lead: The application may collect the following data:
items: company and production data entered by the user
technical data required for the application to operate

sharing.heading: Sharing data
sharing.body: Operonix Production does not share user data with third parties except where necessary for the system to function (for example, Firebase services).

security.heading: Security
security.body: Data is stored using industry-standard security practices.

deletion.heading: Data deletion
deletion.lead: You may request deletion of your data by contacting:

termsOfService.metaDescription: Terms governing use of the Operonix Industrial website and related information services.
termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Operonix Industrial website at operonixindustrial.com (the "Site"). By using the Site, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Site.

sections.heading: Other agreements
sections.body: Use of Operonix software applications (such as Operonix Production or Operonix Maintenance) is governed by separate agreements, licenses, or terms provided when you access those services. These Site Terms apply to the marketing website and general information we publish here.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
sections.body: You agree not to misuse the Site, including attempting unauthorized access to our systems, interfering with the proper working of the Site, introducing malware, scraping the Site in a way that harms our infrastructure, or using the Site for any unlawful purpose.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: The Site and its content (including text, graphics, logos, and layout) are owned by Operonix Industrial or its licensors and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, or distribute Site content without our prior written consent, except as permitted by law.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.body: The Site is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied, regarding the Site and any information provided through it.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Operonix Industrial and its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, arising out of or related to your use of the Site.

sections.heading: Changes
sections.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. The updated version will be posted on this page with a continued effective date implied by publication. Your continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

cookieSettings.metaDescription: How operonixindustrial.com uses cookies and similar technologies, and how you can control them.
cookieSettings.title: Cookie settings
cookieSettings.intro: This notice describes how operonixindustrial.com (the "Site") uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit.

sections.heading: What are cookies?
sections.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make sites work more efficiently and to provide information to site operators.

sections.heading: Cookies we use
sections.body: We use essential cookies required for the Site to function (for example, security and load balancing where applicable by our hosting provider). We also use analytics cookies through Vercel Analytics to collect aggregate usage information (such as page views) to understand how visitors use the Site. These analytics cookies do not identify you personally beyond what your browser shares in ordinary web requests.

sections.heading: Your choices
sections.body: You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Blocking or deleting cookies may affect how the Site works. For more information, see your browser’s help documentation.

sections.heading: Updates
sections.body: We may update this cookie notice from time to time. The latest version will always be available on this page.
